extensionDescription.message: Summarize YouTube videos with your own AI key (Claude / OpenAI / Gemini). Output in Japanese or English.

emptyState.message: Click the Summarize button on a YouTube video page.

errorNoSubtitle.message: This video has no subtitle to summarize.

errorVideoChanged.message: Video changed during processing. Go back to the original video and try again.

errorNoApiKey.message: API key is not set. Please configure in Settings.

errorInvalidKey.message: Invalid API key. Please check your settings.

errorRateLimit.message: Rate limit reached. Please retry later.

errorContextOverflow.message: Video is too long to summarize.

errorOverloaded.message: AI server is overloaded (auto-retry also failed). Please wait a moment and try Regenerate.

apiKeyHint.message: API keys are stored only in this extension's local storage and never sent externally (except during summary execution). Only the active provider's key is used for summary calls.

videoNavigatedBanner.message: A different video is now active.
